text: I wake up at 6:30 every morning, even on weekends. First, I drink a glass of water and go for a short run in the park. After a quick shower, I have breakfast, usually oatmeal and fruit. My work day starts at 9 a.m. I work as a graphic designer, so I spend most of my time at my computer, creating logos and illustrations. I take a short lunch break around noon. In the afternoon, I often have meetings with clients. After work, I exercise again, either by doing yoga or lifting weights. Then I cook dinner, read a book, or watch a TV show. I go to bed by 11 p.m. This routine helps me stay productive and healthy.
